11930.title: Thierry Henry
11930.extract:
Thierry Daniel Henry is a French professional football coach and former player. He is widely regarded as one of the greatest strikers of all time.

== Club career ==
Henry signed for Arsenal in 1999. He scored 228 goals in 377 appearances and won two Premier League titles.

== International career ==
Henry won the FIFA World Cup with France in 1998 and the UEFA European Championship in 2000.

== Honours ==
Arsenal: Premier League 2001-02, 2003-04
